'''tashoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khanjari|khanjari]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-sh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khanjari|khanjari]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tashoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæsheyeth|tæsheyeth]] || [[word:tæsheyej|tæsheyej]] || [[word:tæsheyesh|tæsheyesh]] || [[word:tæsheye|tæsheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tashoshoyoth|tashoshoyoth]] || [[word:tashoshoyoj|tashoshoyoj]] || [[word:tashoshoyosh|tashoshoyosh]] || [[word:tashoshoyo|tashoshoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tashoyoth|tashoyoth]] || [[word:tashoyoj|tashoyoj]] || [[word:tashoyosh|tashoyosh]] || [[word:tashoyo|tashoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tashofyoth|tashofyoth]] || [[word:tashofyoj|tashofyoj]] || [[word:tashofyosh|tashofyosh]] || [[word:tashofyof|tashofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tashoyotho|tashoyotho]] || [[word:tashoyojo|tashoyojo]] || [[word:tashoyosho|tashoyosho]] || [[word:tashoyoko|tashoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tashoyoth|tashoyoth]] || [[word:tashoyoj|tashoyoj]] || [[word:tashoyosh|tashoyosh]] || [[word:tashoyo|tashoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tashoyothol|tashoyothol]] || [[word:tashoyojol|tashoyojol]] || [[word:tashoyoshol|tashoyoshol]] || [[word:tashoyokol|tashoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tashoyothotho|tashoyothotho]] || [[word:tashoyojojo|tashoyojojo]] || [[word:tashoyoshosho|tashoyoshosho]] || [[word:tashoyoko|tashoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tashoyothon|tashoyothon]] || [[word:tashoyojon|tashoyojon]] || [[word:tashoyoshon|tashoyoshon]] || [[word:tashoyokon|tashoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tashoyothoro|tashoyothoro]] || [[word:tashoyojoro|tashoyojoro]] || [[word:tashoyoshoro|tashoyoshoro]] || [[word:tashoyokoro|tashoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
